abilities.name: Disguised
abilities.description: Cannot be targeted by Charge Action.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.description: May choose to ignore one Critical Effect per Dramatic Time.

abilities.name: Take the Hit
abilities.description: After attack hits nearby ally, may discard card to move between ally and attacker, suffering effect instead (-to damage flip). Opponents engaged cannot make Disengaging Strikes.

actions: (1) Daito (Labor) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage, ignoring Armor. Mask Next Target: Move up to 4 yards after damaging. Crow Twist: +.
(1) Collier Navy (Pistol) | AV: 4 (10) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 2.
(2) Flurry | Discard Twist to take three (1) AP attacks with Close Combat weapon vs single target.
system.notes: Masterless wanderers, escaped convicts or fugitives. Hire as cheap bodyguards. Travel in disguise, always moving.
